about: Happy Tails is a solo grooming studio run by Dana Whitfield, a certified groomer with 12 years behind the table. Every pup gets one-on-one, low-stress attention — no cages, no rushing, no assembly line. Just calm, careful grooming and a whole lot of belly rubs.

services.name: Full Groom
services.desc: Bath, full haircut to breed or your preferred style, nails, ears, and a bandana or bow.

services.name: Bath & Tidy
services.desc: Warm bath, blow-dry, brush-out, nail trim, ear clean, and a light tidy of face and feet.

services.name: De-shed Treatment
services.desc: Deep bath with de-shedding conditioner and undercoat blow-out — cuts shedding up to 80%.

services.name: Nail Trim & Grind
services.desc: Quick, gentle nail trim with a smooth grind finish. Walk-ins welcome when the schedule allows.

services.name: Puppy's First Groom
services.desc: A gentle, positive intro to grooming for pups under 6 months — short, sweet, and full of treats.

reviews.text: Dana is the only person my anxious rescue will let near her. Miracle worker.
Best cut Biscuit has ever had, and half the price of the chain place. Booking here forever.
